testcase.name: tbl_mmrm_generates_stacked_table_successfully
testcase.system-out:
Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(arm)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(arm))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─crane::tbl_mmrm(...) at test-tbl_mmrm.R:119:3 2. ├─cards::process_selectors(...) 3. └─cards:::process_selectors.data.frame(...) 4. └─cards:::imap(...) 5. └─cards:::map2(.x, names(.x) %||% seq_along(.x), .f, ...) 6. └─base::mapply(.f, .x, .y, MoreArgs = list(...), SIMPLIFY = FALSE) 7. └─cards (local) `<fn>`(dots[[1L]][[1L]], dots[[2L]][[1L]]) 8. └─cards::cards_select(...) 9. ├─base::tryCatch(...) 10. │ └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 11. │ └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 12. │ └─base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 13. └─tidyselect::eval_select(expr = expr, data = data, ...) 14. └─tidyselect:::eval_select_impl(...) 15. ├─tidyselect:::with_subscript_errors(...) 16. │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 17. └─tidyselect:::vars_select_eval(...) 18. └─tidyselect:::walk_data_tree(expr, data_mask, context_mask) 19. └─tidyselect:::eval_sym(expr, data_mask, context_mask)

testcase.name: tbl_mmrm_generates_stacked_table_successfully
testcase.system-out:
Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(visit)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(visit))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─crane::tbl_mmrm(...) at test-tbl_mmrm.R:119:3 2. ├─cards::process_selectors(...) 3. └─cards:::process_selectors.data.frame(...) 4. └─cards:::imap(...) 5. └─cards:::map2(.x, names(.x) %||% seq_along(.x), .f, ...) 6. └─base::mapply(.f, .x, .y, MoreArgs = list(...), SIMPLIFY = FALSE) 7. └─cards (local) `<fn>`(dots[[1L]][[2L]], dots[[2L]][[2L]]) 8. └─cards::cards_select(...) 9. ├─base::tryCatch(...) 10. │ └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 11. │ └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 12. │ └─base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 13. └─tidyselect::eval_select(expr = expr, data = data, ...) 14. └─tidyselect:::eval_select_impl(...) 15. ├─tidyselect:::with_subscript_errors(...) 16. │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 17. └─tidyselect:::vars_select_eval(...) 18. └─tidyselect:::walk_data_tree(expr, data_mask, context_mask) 19. └─tidyselect:::eval_sym(expr, data_mask, context_mask)

testcase.name: tbl_mmrm_generates_stacked_table_successfully
testcase.system-out:
Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(visit)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(visit))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─crane::tbl_mmrm(...) at test-tbl_mmrm.R:119:3 2. └─gtsummary::tbl_strata(...) 3. └─gtsummary:::tbl_strata_internal(...) 4. ├─cards::process_selectors(...) 5. └─cards:::process_selectors.data.frame(...) 6. └─cards:::imap(...) 7. └─cards:::map2(.x, names(.x) %||% seq_along(.x), .f, ...) 8. └─base::mapply(.f, .x, .y, MoreArgs = list(...), SIMPLIFY = FALSE) 9. └─cards (local) `<fn>`(dots[[1L]][[1L]], dots[[2L]][[1L]]) 10. └─cards::cards_select(...) 11. ├─base::tryCatch(...) 12. │ └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 13. │ └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 14. │ └─base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 15. └─tidyselect::eval_select(expr = expr, data = data, ...) 16. └─tidyselect:::eval_select_impl(...) 17. ├─tidyselect:::with_subscript_errors(...) 18. │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 19. └─tidyselect:::vars_select_eval(...) 20. └─tidyselect:::walk_data_tree(expr, data_mask, context_mask) 21. └─tidyselect:::eval_sym(expr, data_mask, context_mask)

testcase.name: tbl_mmrm_generates_stacked_table_successfully
testcase.system-out:
There were 4 warnings in `dplyr::mutate()`. The first warning was: i In argument: `tbl = switch(...)`. Caused by warning: ! Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(arm)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(arm))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. i Run `dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()` to see the 3 remaining warnings. Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─crane::tbl_mmrm(...) at test-tbl_mmrm.R:119:3 2. │ └─gtsummary::tbl_strata(...) 3. │ └─gtsummary:::tbl_strata_internal(...) 4. │ └─... %>% ... 5. ├─dplyr::mutate(...) 6. └─dplyr:::mutate.data.frame(...) 7. └─dplyr:::mutate_cols(.data, dplyr_quosures(...), by) 8. └─dplyr:::signal_warnings(warnings_state, error_call)

testcase.name: tbl_mmrm_falls_back_cleanly_when_base_df_is_empty
testcase.system-out:
Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(visit)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(visit))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─crane::tbl_mmrm(...) at test-tbl_mmrm.R:144:3 2. └─gtsummary::tbl_strata(...) 3. └─gtsummary:::tbl_strata_internal(...) 4. ├─cards::process_selectors(...) 5. └─cards:::process_selectors.data.frame(...) 6. └─cards:::imap(...) 7. └─cards:::map2(.x, names(.x) %||% seq_along(.x), .f, ...) 8. └─base::mapply(.f, .x, .y, MoreArgs = list(...), SIMPLIFY = FALSE) 9. └─cards (local) `<fn>`(dots[[1L]][[1L]], dots[[2L]][[1L]]) 10. └─cards::cards_select(...) 11. ├─base::tryCatch(...) 12. │ └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 13. │ └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 14. │ └─base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 15. └─tidyselect::eval_select(expr = expr, data = data, ...) 16. └─tidyselect:::eval_select_impl(...) 17. ├─tidyselect:::with_subscript_errors(...) 18. │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 19. └─tidyselect:::vars_select_eval(...) 20. └─tidyselect:::walk_data_tree(expr, data_mask, context_mask) 21. └─tidyselect:::eval_sym(expr, data_mask, context_mask)

testcase.name: tbl_mmrm_falls_back_cleanly_when_base_df_is_empty
testcase.system-out:
There were 4 warnings in `dplyr::mutate()`. The first warning was: i In argument: `tbl = switch(...)`. Caused by warning: ! Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(arm)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(arm))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. i Run `dplyr::last_dplyr_warnings()` to see the 3 remaining warnings. Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─crane::tbl_mmrm(...) at test-tbl_mmrm.R:144:3 2. │ └─gtsummary::tbl_strata(...) 3. │ └─gtsummary:::tbl_strata_internal(...) 4. │ └─... %>% ... 5. ├─dplyr::mutate(...) 6. └─dplyr:::mutate.data.frame(...) 7. └─dplyr:::mutate_cols(.data, dplyr_quosures(...), by) 8. └─dplyr:::signal_warnings(warnings_state, error_call)

testcase.name: tbl_mmrm_handles_base_df_NULL_gracefully_without_baseline_stacking
testcase.system-out:
Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(visit)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(visit))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. Backtrace: ▆ 1. └─crane::tbl_mmrm(...) at test-tbl_mmrm.R:179:3 2. └─gtsummary::tbl_strata(...) 3. └─gtsummary:::tbl_strata_internal(...) 4. ├─cards::process_selectors(...) 5. └─cards:::process_selectors.data.frame(...) 6. └─cards:::imap(...) 7. └─cards:::map2(.x, names(.x) %||% seq_along(.x), .f, ...) 8. └─base::mapply(.f, .x, .y, MoreArgs = list(...), SIMPLIFY = FALSE) 9. └─cards (local) `<fn>`(dots[[1L]][[1L]], dots[[2L]][[1L]]) 10. └─cards::cards_select(...) 11. ├─base::tryCatch(...) 12. │ └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 13. │ └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 14. │ └─base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 15. └─tidyselect::eval_select(expr = expr, data = data, ...) 16. └─tidyselect:::eval_select_impl(...) 17. ├─tidyselect:::with_subscript_errors(...) 18. │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 19. └─tidyselect:::vars_select_eval(...) 20. └─tidyselect:::walk_data_tree(expr, data_mask, context_mask) 21. └─tidyselect:::eval_sym(expr, data_mask, context_mask)

testcase.name: tbl_mmrm_handles_base_df_NULL_gracefully_without_baseline_stacking
testcase.system-out:
There was 1 warning in `dplyr::mutate()`. i In argument: `tbl = switch(...)`. Caused by warning: ! Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0. i Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead. # Was: data %>% select(arm)
# Now: data %>% select(all_of(arm))
See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>. Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─crane::tbl_mmrm(...) at test-tbl_mmrm.R:179:3 2. │ └─gtsummary::tbl_strata(...) 3. │ └─gtsummary:::tbl_strata_internal(...) 4. │ └─... %>% ... 5. ├─dplyr::mutate(...) 6. └─dplyr:::mutate.data.frame(...) 7. └─dplyr:::mutate_cols(.data, dplyr_quosures(...), by) 8. └─dplyr:::signal_warnings(warnings_state, error_call)

testcase.name: tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade_include_overall_works
testcase.failure:
Snapshot of code has changed: old[3:29] vs new[3:29] Output MedDRA System Organ Class 
 MedDRA Preferred Term Grade Placebo 
(N = 86) Xanomeline High Dose 
(N = 84) Xanomeline Low Dose 
(N = 84) 1 CARDIAC DISORDERS <NA> <NA> <NA> - 2 ATRIOVENTRICULAR BLOCK SECOND DEGREE - Any Grade - 2 (2.3%) 3 (3.6%) 0 (0.0%) + 2 ATRIOVENTRICULAR BLOCK SECOND DEGREE - Any Grade - 2 (2.3%) 3 (3.6%) 0 - 3 Grade 1-2 1 (1.2%) 3 (3.6%) 0 (0.0%) + 3 Grade 1-2 1 (1.2%) 3 (3.6%) 0 - 4 1 1 (1.2%) 1 (1.2%) 0 (0.0%) + 4 1 1 (1.2%) 1 (1.2%) 0 - 5 2 0 (0.0%) 2 (2.4%) 0 (0.0%) + 5 2 0 2 (2.4%) 0 - 6 Grade 3-4 1 (1.2%) 0 (0.0%) 0 (0.0%) + 6 Grade 3-4 1 (1.2%) 0 0 - 7 4 1 (1.2%) 0 (0.0%) 0 (0.0%) + 7 4 1 (1.2%) 0 0 8 GASTROINTESTINAL DISORDERS <NA> <NA> <NA> 9 DIARRHOEA - Any Grade - 9 (10.5%) 4 (4.8%) 5 (6.0%) 10 Grade 1-2 9 (10.5%) 4 (4.8%) 5 (6.0%) 11 1 9 (10.5%) 2 (2.4%) 5 (6.0%) - 12 2 0 (0.0%) 2 (2.4%) 0 (0.0%) + 12 2 0 2 (2.4%) 0 13 GENERAL DISORDERS AND ADMINISTRATION SITE CONDITIONS <NA> <NA> <NA> 14 APPLICATION SITE ERYTHEMA - Any Grade - 3 (3.5%) 15 (17.9%) 12 (14.3%) 15 Grade 1-2 3 (3.5%) 12 (14.3%) 7 (8.3%) 16 1 3 (3.5%) 9 (10.7%) 4 (4.8%) - 17 2 0 (0.0%) 3 (3.6%) 3 (3.6%) + 17 2 0 3 (3.6%) 3 (3.6%) - 18 Grade 3-4 0 (0.0%) 3 (3.6%) 5 (6.0%) + 18 Grade 3-4 0 3 (3.6%) 5 (6.0%) - 19 3 0 (0.0%) 3 (3.6%) 3 (3.6%) + 19 3 0 3 (3.6%) 3 (3.6%) - 20 4 0 (0.0%) 0 (0.0%) 2 (2.4%) + 20 4 0 0 2 (2.4%) 21 APPLICATION SITE PRURITUS - Any Grade - 6 (7.0%) 22 (26.2%) 22 (26.2%) 22 Grade 1-2 5 (5.8%) 15 (17.9%) 17 (20.2%) 23 1 5 (5.8%) 10 (11.9%) 13 (15.5%) - 24 2 0 (0.0%) 5 (6.0%) 4 (4.8%) + 24 2 0 5 (6.0%) 4 (4.8%) 25 Grade 3-4 1 (1.2%) 7 (8.3%) 5 (6.0%) * Run `testthat::snapshot_accept("tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade", "testthat")` to accept the change. * Run `testthat::snapshot_review("tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade", "testthat")` to review the change.
